engagera-dig.intro: As a parent, you don't need to take on a fixed role. Even occasional help is invaluable to the group's day-to-day life.

activityList.activity: Cleaning and maintenance of Ruffen or Myset
Transport to hikes and day trips
Practical help at camps and events
Cooking and kitchen assistance at camp

engagera-dig.sectionTwoTitle: Not sure where you fit in?
engagera-dig.sectionTwoIntro: Get in touch and we'll tell you more about what's needed right now. Every contribution counts, big or small.
